why: Official Protocol 775 Play clientbound table assigns minecraft:set_entity_motion to packet id 0x65, and the generated answer proves the official frame/body from client.jar. Stevenarella's current 775 Play clientbound dispatch rejects 0x65.
what: Add/repair Protocol 775 Play clientbound dispatch/body support for minecraft:set_entity_motion without changing the oracle answer. Preserve the official body shape: VarInt entity id followed by Vec3.LP_STREAM_CODEC movement bytes.

answer.observed_failure: bad packet id 0x65 in Clientbound Play
